productDisplayName: ADIDAS Women White Royal Silver Shoe
description: CompositionWhite synthetic leather shoes with purple stripes on the sides, adjustable velcro strap on top, perforated upper and rubber outsole with pivot point on big toe mound Wash care1. Remove dust with soft, clean, damp cloth2. Do not machine washSleek and feminine, these white shoes from adidas are made specially for the fashion forward women. The perforated upper ensures ample ventilation for the feet, while the adjustable velcro strap ensures a customized Fit. The pair looks all the more stylish with the purple stripes on the side and soft, silver sockliner. The rubber outsole with a pivot point on the big toe mound and inner arch ensures optimum grip and stability, making this a perfect footwear for training sessions at the Sports club or gym. Team it with jeans or casuals during picnics and keep your feet healthy and happy.
